beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_ar: The countdown to 100 days before the start of the 2026 World Cup, the largest in the tournament's history, begins on Tuesday. . To mark this significant milestone, beIN SPORTS News will provide special coverage. The opening match is is scheduled for June 11, 2026, at Azteca Stadium in Mexico City, while the tournament will conclude on July 19 at MetLife Stadium near New York. A total of 104 matches will be held across 16 stadiums, with 78 matches taking place in the United States. The FIFA World Cup 2026 will be exclusively broadcast on beIN.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Real Madrid have won 21 of their last 24 matches against Getafe in LaLiga, scoring a total of 55 goals  and conceding just 10 during this period. Getafe have only picked up points in two of their 20 away matches against Real Madrid in LaLiga. Bernd Schuster was in the dugout for both of these games, a 1-1 draw in March 2007 as Getafe coach and a 0-1 win in February 2008 as Real Madrid coach.
